parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Module dimension, determines the size of the matrix A and vectors s, e, y, e1

parameters.name: eta1
parameters.description: Centered binomial distribution parameter for sampling s, e in K-PKE.KeyGen and y in K-PKE.Encrypt

parameters.name: eta2
parameters.description: Centered binomial distribution parameter for sampling e1 and e2 in K-PKE.Encrypt

parameters.name: du
parameters.description: Compression and encoding parameter for the u component of the ciphertext

parameters.name: dv
parameters.description: Compression and encoding parameter for the v component of the ciphertext
